description: C4 Project Automation Hooks - Based on everything-claude-code best practices

PreToolUse.command: echo '🔒 Security check before commit...' && ! grep -rn --include='*.py' --include='*.ts' --include='*.js' -E '(password|api_key|secret|token)\s*=\s*["'\'][^"'\']+("'\'']' . 2>/dev/null | grep -v -E '(test_|_test\.py|spec\.ts|\.env\.example)' | head -5
PreToolUse.description: Scan for hardcoded secrets before committing

PreToolUse.command: echo '❌ Force push to main/master is BLOCKED!' && exit 1
PreToolUse.description: Block force push to main branch

PostToolUse.command: uv run ruff check --fix $FILE 2>/dev/null && uv run ruff format $FILE 2>/dev/null || true
PostToolUse.description: Auto-lint and format Python files after edit
Auto-lint and format TypeScript files after edit

PostToolUse.command: npx tsc --noEmit 2>/dev/null || echo '⚠️ TypeScript type errors detected'
PostToolUse.description: Run TypeScript type check after edit
Run go vet after Go file edits

PostToolUse.command: grep -n 'console.log' $FILE 2>/dev/null && echo '⚠️ console.log found - consider removing before commit' || true

Stop.command: echo '🔍 Final session cleanup check...' && (grep -rn --include='*.py' --include='*.ts' --include='*.js' 'TODO: remove' . 2>/dev/null | head -5 && echo '⚠️ Found TODO: remove markers - please clean up') || echo '✅ No cleanup markers found'
Stop.description: Check for cleanup markers at session end

PermissionRequest.description: LLM-based auto-judgment for gray-zone tool permissions using Haiku. Configured in .c4/config.yaml (permission_reviewer section). Returns allow/deny; falls back to ask on error.
